description.p: indexed builds a full index of your local filesystems and returns search results as you type, with no perceptible delay even across millions of files. It is a feature-for-feature Linux port of winindex.

ul.li: Instant, debounced search over a persistent on-disk index
Live index updates via fanotify (privileged helper) or inotify
SIMD-accelerated substring search (AVX2/SSE4.2) with runtime dispatch
Portable mode, smart default exclusions, full context-menu integration

description.p: First release: search, live monitoring, and privileged helper for full-system indexing.
